description: On ash: devbox-keygen ash-devbox -> update modules/secrets.nix -> sops updatekeys -> devbox-install ash-devbox -> devbox-rebuild -> nix build a derivation and verify it goes to the devbox. Same on spectre.

comments.text: ash-devbox verified end-to-end: bootstrap, rebuild, sops decryption on devbox, docker server, ssh via tailnet alias. spectre-devbox follows the same recipe — devbox-keygen spectre-devbox, drop the new age recipient into modules/secrets.nix, devbox-bootstrap then devbox-rebuild.

title: End-to-end test: spectre-devbox + ash-devbox
